description: Universal agent registry. ANY AI can be registered here to operate the autopilot. Claude Code is primary. Others are pluggable backups.

claude-code.name: Claude Code
claude-code.notes: Primary agent. Has full filesystem access. Operates via CLI.

devin.name: Devin
devin.tools: VM + browser + shell + GitHub API + MCP
devin.notes: Autonomous DevOps/SRE/Cloud specialist. Full VM with browser, shell, and persistent environment. Can monitor workflows, diagnose CI, operate triggers, and manage infrastructure.

backup.description: Backup agent that takes over if primary is unavailable
backup.activationTrigger: Primary agent idle for >30 min with pending tasks

specialist.description: Specialist agent for specific tasks (code implementation, refactoring)
specialist.activationTrigger: Manual assignment via issue or trigger file

monitor.description: Monitor agent that watches pipelines and alerts

agentTemplate._comment: Copy this template to register a new agent in the 'agents' object above
agentTemplate.name: Agent Name

rules.registration: Add agent to 'agents' object + add branchPrefix to 'branchPrefixes' array
rules.isolation: Each agent has exclusive memory files. NEVER cross-modify.
rules.locking: Check session-lock.json before state-changing operations. If locked by another agent, create handoff.
rules.commits: Agent commits in autopilot repo should identify the agent. Corporate repo commits should NOT.
rules.mainBranch: Direct push to main is BLOCKED. All changes via branch + PR + squash merge.
rules.autoMerge: auto-merge-sweeper.yml and autonomous-merge-direct.yml handle agent PRs automatically.

legacyAgents._comment: These agents were previously hardcoded. Their files remain for historical reference but the system no longer depends on them.

copilot.note: Can be re-activated by adding to 'agents' with status:active

codex.note: Can be re-activated by adding to 'agents' with status:active
